dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Paul. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Paul! How can I help you today?
I work as a full-stack developer. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A full-stack developer — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
By the way, I'm also interested in Kubernetes.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
